headline: Conagra Says Rising Beef, Oil and Logistics Costs Will Keep Inflation Elevated
summary: Conagra (NYSE: CAG) cuts its dividend in half and forecasts a weak fiscal 2027. Shares fall in premarket trading. Read more.
